parameters.name: X-Correlation-ID
parameters.description: Identifier of the operation. If it is set, the value will be used as a correlation ID for all requests sent during the current request and it will be sent as a OperationId in Kafka messages.

401.description: Returned when the request does not include the Authorization header or includes an invalid or expired token.

500.description: Returned when the server encounters an unexpected condition or unhandled exception.

400.description: Returned when the request is malformed or missing required parameters.

403.description: Response when the user does not have permissions to perform this operation.

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.
Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: 'Bearer TOKEN'
Bearer.name: Authorization
